form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at this track November 20 over 900m, 7 len behind Killer Crown with 54kg at $7.10. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at this track October 13 over 900m, 5 len behind Hi Barbie with 54kg at $1.80. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after nearly two years raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 10 at this track on March 3 over 1400m, 7 len behind Natsu Hayate with 56kg at $5.70. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at this track on June 13 2024 over 1400m, 9 len behind Sekitei Juo carrying 56kg at $4.60. Likely improver.

form.formComment: Comes off a 36 day let-up. Last start 5th of 11 at this track on March 4 over 900m, 4 len behind Kaunis Mieli with 54kg at $30.10. The run before that sat on the speed throughout before fading 7th of 12 at this track on February 3 over 900m, 8 len behind Nakimushi Hikaru carrying 54kg at $34.20. Low draw but others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 30-day let-up. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Funabashi on March 10 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Arabian Palace carrying 55kg at $14.20. The start before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 4 over 900m, 2 len behind Kaunis Mieli with 56kg at $2.90. Progressing well and a win is on the cards.
